reason: Acceptance criteria and expected focused verification for the completed round.
Global quality bar and implementation language boundaries.
Check RVV extension-op body authority, descriptor mirror limits, selected config, and RVV evidence wording.
Check common EmitC route provenance and descriptor/body mismatch behavior.
Check target artifact export, runtime ABI, bundle coherence, and selected-plan metadata preservation.
